payloads.text:
Here's a user-friendly version of that update:

Good morning! I'm working on your daily status report but need a little help accessing your schedule. Could you:

1. Share the Feishu document or Bitable URL with your agenda
2. Tell me where your daily schedule is stored in your workspace
3. Or explain how you typically organize your calendar data

Once you let me know, I'll be able to complete your morning status update!
